title: Signup form layout broken on mobile
description: The signup form does not render correctly on mobile devices. Fields overlap and the submit button is hidden.

title: Login fails for mixed-case emails
description: Users who registered with 'alice@example.com' cannot login using 'Alice@Example.com'. The email lookup in auth/login.py is case-sensitive. Expected behavior: email matching should be case-insensitive.

title: Signup accepts invalid phone numbers
description: The signup form in forms/signup.py accepts any string as a phone number. There is no regex validation. Expected behavior: only accept phone numbers matching the pattern +<country_code><10-15 digits>.
